zh-CN.name: 字母B
zh-CN.intro: 字母B是英文字母表里的第二个字母。它发出的声音像小鼓的‘嘣’。很多可爱的东西都用B开头哦！

story.title: 🐻小熊的字母B
story.body: 小熊贝贝拿着一个字母B卡片。它说：‘B，B，B！’ 贝贝喜欢字母B，因为B是它的名字开头。它又指着皮球说：‘球，Ball！也是B开头！’ 还有香蕉：‘香蕉，Banana！也是B！’ 贝贝开心地拍了拍皮球：‘蹦！蹦！蹦！’ 皮球跳得好高。字母B真好玩，它像一个大肚子，有两个小圈圈。贝贝把卡片贴在墙上，每天都说：‘B！B！B！’

knowledge.title: B是什么字母？
knowledge.body: B是英语字母表中的第二个字母。它是辅音字母，发音时嘴唇轻轻碰在一起。很多日常用品的名字都以B开头，比如球、熊和香蕉。

en.name: B
en.intro: B is the second letter in the English alphabet. It makes a sound like a drum: b-b-b! Many fun things start with B.

story.title: 🐻Little Bear's Letter B
story.body: Little bear Ben holds a card with the letter B. He says, 'B, B, B!' Ben loves the letter B because his name starts with it. He points to a ball and says, 'Ball starts with B too!' And a banana, 'Banana starts with B!' Ben bounces the ball, 'Bounce, bounce, bounce!' The ball goes high. The letter B is so much fun. It looks like a big belly with two little circles. Ben sticks the card on the wall and says every day, 'B! B! B!'

knowledge.title: What is the letter B?
knowledge.body: B is the second letter in the English alphabet. It is a consonant, made by pressing your lips together. Many everyday words start with B, like ball, bear, and banana.
